ddls:
CREATE TABLE "encoding_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding configuration */,
  "cabac" INTEGER /* CABAC (Context-Adaptive Binary Arithmetic Coding) value */,
  "ref" INTEGER /* Reference frames used for encoding */,
  "deblock" TEXT /* Deblocking filter settings */,
  "analyse" TEXT /* Analysis settings for motion estimation */,
  "me" TEXT /* Motion estimation algorithm used */,
  "subme" INTEGER /* Sub-pixel motion estimation value */,
  "mixed_ref" INTEGER /* Mixed reference frames used */,
  "me_range" INTEGER /* Motion estimation range */,
  "trellis" INTEGER /* Trellis quantization value */,
  "8x8dct" INTEGER /* 8x8 DCT (Discrete Cosine Transform) enabled */,
  "fast_pskip" INTEGER /* Fast PSKIP (skip macroblocks with no residual) enabled */,
  "chroma_qp_offset" INTEGER /* Chroma QP (Quantization Parameter) offset */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Target profile for the encoding configuration */,
  "preset" TEXT /* Preset used for the encoding configuration */,
  "tune" TEXT /* Tune used for the encoding configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration used */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the encoded video file */,
  "usertime" REAL /* User time taken for encoding */,
  "systemtime" REAL /* System time taken for encoding */,
  "elapsedtime" TEXT /* Elapsed time taken for encoding */,
  "cpu" INTEGER /* CPU usage during encoding */,
  "frames" INTEGER /* Number of frames encoded */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second (FPS) achieved */,
  "kbs" REAL /* Kilobits per second (Kbps) achieved */,
  "ssim" REAL /* Structural similarity index (SSIM) of the encoded video */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of the encoded video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, encoder, analyst) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding task */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the encoding task (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bframes" (
  "bframe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each B-frame setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "bframes" INTEGER /* Number of B-frames used */,
  "b_pyramid" TEXT /* B-frame pyramid structure */,
  "b_adapt" TEXT /* B-frame adaptation enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bframe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bframes_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "direct" (
  "direct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direct prediction setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "direct" TEXT /* Direct prediction mode */,
  "weightb" TEXT /* Weighted B-frames enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_direct_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_gop" (
  "gop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open GOP setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "open_gop" INTEGER /* Open GOP enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_gop_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weightp" (
  "weightp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weighted prediction setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "weightp" INTEGER /* Weighted prediction enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weightp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weightp_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenecut" (
  "scenecut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene cut detection setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "scenecut" INTEGER /* Scene cut detection enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenecut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenecut_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rc_lookahead" (
  "rc_lookahead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate control lookahead setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "rc_lookahead" INTEGER /* Rate control lookahead value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rc_lookahead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rc_lookahead_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mbtree" (
  "mbtree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each macroblock tree setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "mbtree" INTEGER /* Macroblock tree enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mbtree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mbtree_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qpmax" (
  "qpmax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maximum QP setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "qpmax" INTEGER /* Maximum QP value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qpmax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qpmax_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aq_mode" (
  "aq_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQ mode setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "aq_mode" INTEGER /* AQ mode enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aq_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aq_mode_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_config_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical encoding configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encoding_config_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video file */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding task that generated the file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the video file */,
  "filetype" TEXT /* Type of the video file (e.g., MP4, AVI) */,
  "filesize" INTEGER /* Size of the video file in bytes */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video file (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_files_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES encoding_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
